titleStmt.title: SII 15.112: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 112. (B.K. No. 80 of 1929-30.) BĀGĒVĀḌI, BAGEVADI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a small slab standing near the well at the Sāraṅga-maṭha.
This is dated the 3rd regnal year of the king, Virōdhi, Pushya śu. 5, Thursday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkramaṇa, corresponding to 1169 A.D., December 25.
It records a gift of certain donations and contributions in kind to the temple of Mallikārjuna at the agrahāra of Bāgevāḍi by the Five Hundred Kottaḷis.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē trai
ḷōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁ[bhavē .]

sōyidēva va¨rśada 3 neya virōdhi saṁvatsa
rada puṣya śuddha 5 vrihaspativāradaṁdanuttarāya
ṇa saṁkrānti [pa¨rvva] nimittadiṁ śrīmaduttamada
grahāraṁ bāgevāḍiya śrī mallikā¨rjjunadēva
ra dhūpadēpanaivēdya caitrapavitra khaṁḍasphuṭita
jī¨rṇnōddhārakkavalliya mālagāṟago
ttaḷi vokkalalu ciṭṭe maduva madavaṇigana
lli hāga 1 madavaḷigeyalli hāga 1 jōḷa koḷaga 3
pūjāri tapōdhanana kāpiṁge bēḷe saṁkrāntiya bēḷeko
ttaḷiyaynū¨rvva¨rggavara saṁgata hūvaṁ kaṭṭi haḍadudu
gauṟedēva¨rgge vrittiyiṁ dhāregoṁḍavaralli hāga 1
bēṟūriṁ baṁda bāḍu kāya bhaṇḍi 1 kkaṁ kālarū 12 Uḷḷiya sa
[¨rvvabādha] kaṭṭu 1 nahi koThe lines following are built in.
